sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِنَا الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Moramo zaštititi naše lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: We must protect our personal information on the internet.

sentences.arabic: الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ يُسَاعِدُنَا فِي مَنْعِ السَّرِقَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Cyber sigurnost nam pomaže u sprečavanju digitalne krađe.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity helps us prevent digital theft.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ كَلِمَاتِ السِّرِّ الْخَاصَّةَ بِكَ مَعَ أَيِّ شَخْصٍ.
sentences.translation: Ne dijeli svoje privatne lozinke ni sa kim.
sentences.translationEn: Do not share your private passwords with anyone.
